title: MoyShieldtrain
description: MoyShieldtrain replaces the usual boring minecarts, rails and sounds with trains and wagons from the CIS! It can also be used with the TrainCarts plugin, which allows you to pair wagons on the server. OptiFine is required!
body: Hello everyone! MoyShieldtrain replaces the usual boring minecarts, rails and sounds with trains and wagons from the CIS! It can also be used with the TrainCarts plugin, which allows you to pair wagons on the server. OptiFine is required!
